item.title: Kristi Noem tightens her grip on the Department of Homeland Security
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has upended DHS staffing in her first year, pairing high-level leadership ousters with a growing staff exodus....

item.title: Overdoses are dropping, but poly-drug mixes are rewriting the U.S. drug crisis
item.description: Overdose deaths are falling, but America's illicit drug supply is re-engineering itself into lethal cocktails: fentanyl plus stimulants, sedatives, an...

item.title: Congress risks major loss to Trump over war powers vote on Iran
item.description: Barring a surprise, Congress and its elected leaders are on track to give President Trump the equivalent of a green light ahead of a potential major w...
